583212908.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
583212908.en_literal: You dare to destroy the moon?

863803791.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
863803791.jp_real: ツルギごと、ヤミでクルンでやろ。
863803791.en_literal: I'll wrap you up in darkness like a sword.
863803791.english: I shall blanket every blade in darkness.

427559856.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
427559856.jp_real: ほれ、もう少し暴いてみせよ
427559856.en_literal: Hurry up and struggle a little more.
427559856.english: Come! See if you can weather our blows!

656143919.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
656143919.jp_real: なかなかに興味深い戦い方よね。悪くないぞよ。
656143919.en_literal: You've got quite the interesting fighting style. Not bad at all.
656143919.english: Ooh, very good! Your technique pleases me!

560243320.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
560243320.jp_real: わかりやすい攻め所があるずよ
560243320.en_literal: There's an obvious opening to attack.

30599192.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
30599192.jp_real: この程度、いくらでも砕けよう
30599192.en_literal: This is nothing. I'll crush you no matter how many there are!

359568918.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
359568918.jp_real: 最後の景色は楽しんだか？
359568918.en_literal: Did you enjoy the final view?

68903100.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
68903100.jp_real: なかなかに楽しめた。礼を言っておくぞよ。
68903100.en_literal: I've had quite a bit of fun. I'll give you a little lesson.
68903100.english: Thank you. You've brought me amusement.

313708583.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
313708583.jp_real: とく沈めてくれよーぜ
313708583.english: Let us subdue this giant quickly!

330702227.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
330702227.jp_real: いかに極とも消えるは一瞬。儚いな。
330702227.en_literal: Even the most extreme things vanish in an instant. How fleeting.
330702227.english: Despite your heft, you'll be gone in an instant! Pitiful creation!

556716198.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
556716198.jp_real: ほれ、もっとギコギコと駆動してみせよ。
556716198.en_literal: Hah! Show me more of that flashy nonsense!
556716198.english: Oh, metal creature! Do that clanky thing once more!

714184413.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
714184413.jp_real: まるで玩具のようで愉快ぞよ
714184413.en_literal: Like a gang, we're having a great time!
714184413.english: I do like to break the occasional toy.

356935876.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
356935876.jp_real: クロガネ人形もそろそろ塩時かえ？
356935876.en_literal: Even the black iron doll... is it about time you were put to rest?
356935876.english: Perhaps it's time to be away with this creaky doll.

662379389.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
662379389.jp_real: 神妙でおもしろい！次はどんな動きをするのかや！
662379389.en_literal: Mysterious and interesting! I wonder what kind of move they'll make next!
662379389.english: How strange, how delightful! How does it move?

741365119.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
741365119.jp_real: ホオ？随分と息があっておるようだが。
741365119.en_literal: Hoh? You've got quite a bit of spirit, I see.
741365119.english: Huh! They work in perfect harmony!

1043654353.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
1043654353.jp_real: そろそろ終わらせてもよいかい？
1043654353.en_literal: Shall we wrap this up soon?

709071200.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
709071200.jp_real: おうじょうぎあがわるいのはきらいではないぜよ
709071200.en_literal: I don't mind a little bad luck.

926167771.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
926167771.jp_real: そち達はつがい…ではないのかや？判別が難しいぞや。
926167771.en_literal: You're quite the sight, aren't you? It's hard to tell you two apart.
926167771.english: Finally you die... Not? What is the truth of your coupling?

818892542.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
818892542.jp_real: そう、息急ぐな。神がかりの子よ。
818892542.en_literal: Don't rush things so much, you little godling.
818892542.english: Why run to your death, vessel?

709377958.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
709377958.jp_real: ソチに別の道があったなら、あるいは
709377958.en_literal: If there was another way to do it... Or...
709377958.english: You will tread a new path... or else.

981302375.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
981302375.jp_real: タワムレもここまでかや
981302375.en_literal: Even the shadows have their limits.

439261825.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
439261825.jp_real: トキウはミチタ。コナタが相手になるゾヨ。
439261825.en_literal: Time is up. I'll be your opponent.
439261825.english: The time has finally come. I deem you worthy to face me.

611287742.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
611287742.jp_real: ホオ？寸でのところで制御はできるのかや
611287742.en_literal: Hoh? You think you can control me with that little trick?
611287742.english: Hah! You possess some manner of control.

812528857.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
812528857.jp_real: さて、いつまでも遊んでいるわけにはいかないな。
812528857.en_literal: Well then, I suppose I can't keep playing around forever.
812528857.english: Yes. I believe the time for recreation has passed.

980849.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
980849.jp_real: そのリガイの力、どう扱う？
980849.en_literal: How shall I use that power of yours?
980849.english: Power beyond reason, entrusted to a mortal.

775897941.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
775897941.jp_real: なるほどなるほど。これは興味深いぞよ。
775897941.en_literal: I see, I see. This is quite interesting.

638764857.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
638764857.jp_real: 意思なく暴れているだけぞよ
638764857.english: Look at this husk. Void of thought or feeling.

155305940.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
155305940.jp_real: ウツロナル ソンザイヨ。クロニソマルガヨイ。
155305940.en_literal: Oblivion, I am. Black is the better color.
155305940.english: Hollow monster, you will know the night!

578878551.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
578878551.en_literal: Alright, let's go one more round!
578878551.english: Hold fast, and the day is ours!

441351437.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
441351437.english: This calls for a little domination.

683268956.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
683268956.jp_real: 無に帰れ、空虚なる獣よ。
683268956.en_literal: Return to nothingness, you pitiful beast.
683268956.english: To the void with you, Hollow Beast!

832594982.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
832594982.jp_real: ふふっ、風はそう吹いたか
832594982.en_literal: Hehe... the wind's blowing that way, is it?
832594982.english: The wind changes in our favor.

477589594.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
477589594.en_literal: You're a bit of a nuisance.

589677765.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
589677765.jp_real: ふふふ、楽しげに戦うものよ。
589677765.en_literal: Hehe, you fight with such delight.

896359453.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
896359453.en_literal: No enemies in my path. Let's go.
896359453.english: We stand at the pinnacle! You are nothing!

537314666.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
537314666.jp_real: このまま沈めてくれるわ
537314666.en_literal: I'll sink you down like this!

983298892.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
983298892.jp_real: 面白くなってきたぜよ

124744216.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
124744216.en_literal: Let's get serious for a moment.

414348190.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
414348190.jp_real: ロクリュウがコクのチカラ、オモイシルガヨイ！
414348190.en_literal: Six dragons, the power of darkness... I know it well!
414348190.english: Behold! Black of the Six! And her fearsome might!

747291121.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
747291121.jp_real: 空の断わり、従ってもらわねばな
747291121.en_literal: The sky's will must be obeyed.
747291121.english: All are beholden to the laws of the skies!

956148375.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
956148375.jp_real: おろかしくもはかなきゆめよ。くさびがてずからまくをおろしてやろうぞ。
956148375.en_literal: Foolish and fleeting dream. I'll personally pull the curtain down for you.
956148375.english: As wedge of the skies, I shall end this fleeting hollow delusion.

663411492.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
663411492.jp_real: 修悪ではあるが、これもまた一つの祈りか。
663411492.en_literal: Though it is a sin, this too is another form of prayer.
663411492.english: Your claims disgust me. But your resolve is clear.

74988573.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
74988573.jp_real: ソチがスクワズトモ アカシタチはモエテオルゾヨ
74988573.en_literal: Even if the measures fail, the witnesses are burning.
74988573.english: Life shall persist! No matter your fruitless salvation!

448394587.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
448394587.en_literal: Better to sleep in the darkness.

642248494.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
642248494.jp_real: 金銃に手を染めたかや、哀れな星の民よ。
642248494.en_literal: You've stained your hands with the forbidden. Wretched people of the star.
642248494.english: Foolish astral, you sully your hands with forbidden arts.

729470080.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
729470080.jp_real: 抗いがたい運命だとは思いたくないが
729470080.en_literal: I don't want to believe it's an inescapable fate...
729470080.english: Do not be swept away by a fate unwanted.

910229544.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
910229544.jp_real: アカシは揺らぐ。トバリが下りる。
910229544.en_literal: The omen trembles. The shroud descends.

511987755.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
511987755.jp_real: カミガカリのコヨ。そのアカシをオオキクモヤスガヨイ。
511987755.en_literal: The night of the gods, let us burn that proof bright!
511987755.english: Vessel of Destruction! Let your soul burn bright!

168292869.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
168292869.jp_real: カミガカリのこの…これはなんだ？同質の力を感じるぜよ。
168292869.en_literal: This power of the god's servant... what is it? I can feel the power of the void.
168292869.english: It is the vessel... but not. I sense destruction within its form.

78763044.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
78763044.jp_real: この程度では余興にもならんぞ
78763044.en_literal: This won't even be a threat.
78763044.english: Have you nothing else to show?

705661429.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
705661429.jp_real: すべてクロエと染めようぜ

65147222.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
65147222.en_literal: Heh heh... You're quite the fighter.
65147222.english: So you have bite after all.

596523730.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
596523730.jp_real: いや、やはりこの力は間違いあるまい。
596523730.en_literal: Indeed... this power... there's no mistake.
596523730.english: That power... Yes... I know it well.

736435335.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
736435335.jp_real: なるほど。神がかりのこと言うわけだな。
736435335.en_literal: I see. So you're talking about the God's Hand.
736435335.english: So... we face the Vessel of Destruction, do we?

131905459.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
131905459.jp_real: ふむ、やはりコナタが押されるか。
131905459.en_literal: Hmph. So Konata is going to be pushed after all.

114237757.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
114237757.en_literal: The mire has grown too deep.

1004027660.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
1004027660.jp_real: コヤツは…そういうことか！
1004027660.english: I see now... your true nature.

842867957.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
842867957.en_literal: Hmph. You're hiding in the back?

177308813.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
177308813.jp_real: 右も左も戦ぶね。もっと面白き船はないのかや？
177308813.en_literal: Right and left, warships. Don't you have a more interesting ship?
177308813.english: Warships as far as the eye can see. Have they nothing more amusing?

746030950.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
746030950.english: I'll finish this in a blink!

928362068.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
928362068.jp_real: 過労に塗れても無駄だというに
928362068.en_literal: Even if you're suffocating in poison, it's useless.
928362068.english: Flock together if you like! It matters not.

639399582.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
639399582.jp_real: 聖堂とやらに向かってやろうぜ
639399582.en_literal: I'll go against the likes of you!
639399582.english: Let us proceed to the monastery.

1021076022.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
1021076022.jp_real: フーム。風がある方が面白くなるであろう。
1021076022.en_literal: Hmph. It'll be more interesting with some wind.
1021076022.english: Huh... Perhaps binding my hands would make this interesting.

402610065.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
402610065.jp_real: ふぅ？あの柱に描かれているものは…
402610065.en_literal: Huh? What's drawn on that pillar...?

763869784.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
763869784.jp_real: 進むぞよ！触媒とやらを見つけたいのであろう？
763869784.en_literal: Let's go! You're looking for the culprits, aren't you?
763869784.english: Press on! The catalyst shall not find itself!

737433406.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
737433406.jp_real: ううう……。探し物てやろは、まだ見つからんのかよ？
737433406.en_literal: Huh... Still haven't found what you're looking for?
737433406.english: Ugh! A thousand curses on that hidden device!

525109156.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
525109156.jp_real: モノサガシカ。ナノゾウオモシロキモノデモミツカルトイイガ。
525109156.en_literal: Looking for something? I hope you find something interesting.
525109156.english: So begins our treasure hunt. If only it promised entertainment.

61266064.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
61266064.jp_real: 遊び足りぬとあらば、相手になるぞよ。
61266064.en_literal: If you're looking for a fight, I'll be your opponent.
61266064.english: If you're so starved of joy, I shall play with you.

86899025.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
86899025.jp_real: 無礼なところです。そよ風であることは変わらぬのでな。
86899025.en_literal: Even if you're crowded together, you'll still be a nuisance.
86899025.english: Flock as you like. You remain nothing more than sheep.

188169900.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
188169900.jp_real: ここは通してもらうぞよ

491980238.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
491980238.en_literal: Hehehe, I'm gonna ruin your fun!

144153973.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
144153973.en_literal: Hmph. You're not as tough as you look.

290079110.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
290079110.jp_real: 振りかかる者は払わねばな
290079110.en_literal: I must cleanse what's descending upon us.
290079110.english: Let us fight shadow with shadow.

837777810.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
837777810.jp_real: んんんんん？ここを徒歩で登るのかや？
837777810.english: We scale this spire... by foot?

687801050.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
687801050.jp_real: ほれ、もっとコナタを楽しませよ！
687801050.en_literal: Now, let's have some more fun.

332421087.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
332421087.jp_real: そちたちに三銃を送ろ

495949648.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
495949648.jp_real: 興味深い連撃であったぞよ
495949648.en_literal: That was an interesting chain attack.

556907662.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
556907662.en_literal: That synergy just now... simply magnificent!

210212523.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
210212523.jp_real: みんな、よき活躍であった

933987038.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
933987038.en_literal: We're getting along well, aren't we?

895218061.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
895218061.jp_real: 今度は私たちの連携で圧倒するぞよ！
895218061.en_literal: I'll overwhelm you with your own teamwork!
895218061.english: Overwhelm them with our combined might!

484943425.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
484943425.jp_real: コナタたちの力、見せつけてやるぞよ！
484943425.en_literal: I'll show you the power of the chosen ones!
484943425.english: Bear witness to our full might!

136033481.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
136033481.jp_real: さあ、空の絆の真髄を示せ
136033481.en_literal: Now, show the true power of the bond of the sky.
136033481.english: Show them the spirit of the skies!

128556450.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
128556450.jp_real: 深淵へと誘ってくれよぞ
128556450.english: Come, join us in the abyss!

517261013.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
517261013.jp_real: クフフ、もっと褒め称えよ！

1059826837.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
1059826837.jp_real: うゥム！引き続き、こなたを楽しませるゾヨ！
1059826837.en_literal: Hmph. I'll continue to entertain you.
1059826837.english: Yes. I had hunger for entertainment.

266053716.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
266053716.jp_real: 今度はお前が感謝してやるんだよ

501435314.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
501435314.jp_real: 今度はお前も同意しようぜ

905492261.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
905492261.jp_real: 次は、さらに闇を深めるとしようぞ。
905492261.en_literal: Next, I'll make the darkness even deeper.
905492261.english: Our next foe will drown in my deepest black!

1040566013.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
1040566013.jp_real: これが絆の力というわけだな
1040566013.en_literal: So this is what you call the power of bonds, huh?
1040566013.english: Hmm... So companionship was the key.

883777487.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_2
883777487.jp_real: なんぞ？まだ足りぬと申すかや？
883777487.en_literal: Hmph. Still not enough, I suppose?
883777487.english: What? You've not had your fill?

1038327729.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
1038327729.jp_real: 人の子の期待には応えねばな
1038327729.en_literal: I have to live up to this child's expectations.
1038327729.english: We mustn't betray the mortals' expectations.

725761666.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A
725761666.en_literal: I won't let you compliment me!

431977002.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_3
431977002.jp_real: ほほ～張り切っておるな
431977002.en_literal: Heh heh... you're really going all out, aren't you?
431977002.english: Such vigor for a sky dweller!

248951529.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
248951529.jp_real: そちの変化もまた、空の進化の性質によるものかや？
248951529.en_literal: Could this change also be due to the nature of the evolution of the sky?
248951529.english: A reformed astral. Have you evolved alongside these skies?

783252690.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
783252690.jp_real: 人の子の精鋭であるな、そちは。
783252690.en_literal: You're a human's soul, aren't you?

1006718917.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
1006718917.jp_real: ほれ、こなたに拝仰う。ラカム！とやらを見せよ！
1006718917.en_literal: Huh? You're late, Rackam! Show me what you've got!
1006718917.english: Come, use that technique which makes everyone cry! Rackam!

453434371.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
453434371.jp_real: ほほ～、華やかなものだね。
453434371.english: Ooh, such vivid magic you wield!

931257161.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
931257161.jp_real: なるほど。これが年の功というものかや。
931257161.en_literal: I see. So this is what you call a 'city's core'?
931257161.english: I see your age has brought wisdom.

801627028.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
801627028.jp_real: さしずめ、闇に咲く花といったところかの。
801627028.en_literal: I'd say it's more like a flower blooming in the darkness.
801627028.english: Huh. How beautifully your roses bloom in the darkness.

309589417.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
309589417.jp_real: フーム、早すぎてよくわからんぞよ。
309589417.en_literal: Hmph! Too fast for me to keep up!
309589417.english: Halt! You move much too swiftly!

82541919.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
82541919.jp_real: ウームウーム、元気でヨイヨイ

969272529.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
969272529.jp_real: そちの炎は心地よいなあ。強い信念を感じるぞよ。
969272529.en_literal: Your flames are pleasant to feel. I can sense your strong beliefs.
969272529.english: What pleasant flames! I sense conviction in their crackle.

205421132.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
205421132.jp_real: フムム…龍の血を抑えながら生きるのは難技であろう？
205421132.en_literal: Hmph. Living while suppressing the dragon's blood... how pathetic.
205421132.english: Is it not toilsome to suppress your dragon blood?

585316843.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
585316843.jp_real: 面白い動きをする。ふぅ？もっと見せよ！
585316843.en_literal: You're moving in an interesting way. Huh? Show me more!
585316843.english: Quite the holy hailstorm! Show me more!

876922872.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
876922872.jp_real: おお？スムジカゼと思ったが違ったか。
876922872.en_literal: Oh? I thought you were a pushover, but I was wrong.
876922872.english: Huh. One could mistake you for a whirlwind.

690048281.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
690048281.jp_real: そちの蝶々、遊備で目にあかぬぞえ
690048281.en_literal: You're too late, Narmaya. I'll put an end to your foolishness.
690048281.english: Those butterflies... I shall never tire of your elegant swordplay.

187279270.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
187279270.jp_real: 人の子に限界はないのかもしれんぞよ
187279270.en_literal: There might not be any limits to what humans can do.
187279270.english: Perhaps mortals have no limitations after all!

523142319.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
523142319.jp_real: 痛みを感じぬ体とは、不便も多かろうな。
523142319.en_literal: To feel pain... that must be quite a burden.
523142319.english: A body absent of pain must prove arduous in itself.

677565926.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
677565926.jp_real: 今度は誰かと合わせてくれたのかえ？

555353575.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
555353575.jp_real: 残念だったなあ。青の娘は既に特異点の次代であろう。
555353575.en_literal: Too bad. The blue girl's already a perfect match for the point of interest.
555353575.english: Alas, you're too late. The Singularity and girl in blue have already formed a dyad.

21727859.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
21727859.jp_real: 空の世界のため、力を尽くす措置には礼を言わねばな。
21727859.en_literal: For the sake of the world above, I suppose I should say a prayer before unleashing my full power.
21727859.english: You've done well to keep the skies from ruin. You have my gratitude.

582799130.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
582799130.jp_real: クロのダクルウに落ちよ
582799130.en_literal: Hehehe... Fall into the black abyss!

682759179.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
682759179.jp_real: それが魔導の館へ。面白き軌道よ。
682759179.en_literal: That's the magic door. How interesting.
682759179.english: Are those magic arrows? Their trajectory pleases me.

592852474.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
592852474.jp_real: なるほど。単純明快な戦術ぞよ。
592852474.en_literal: I see. That's a remarkably clear-cut strategy.
592852474.english: I've not witnessed such straightforward tactics.

391877831.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
391877831.jp_real: 剣を浮かせて操るかぁ。面白い技で小柄を補うものよ。
391877831.en_literal: You're going to manipulate me with that sword? A clever trick to make up for your small size.
391877831.english: How do you manipulate those blades? Your small frame hardly matters with such a technique!

220496933.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
220496933.jp_real: ライコウすらも黒に沈めようぜ
220496933.en_literal: Even the light will be drowned in black.
220496933.english: Even lightning shall be consumed by the darkness.

162953171.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
162953171.jp_real: フム。ところで、そちも特異点に興味があるのかや？
162953171.en_literal: Hmph. By the way, are you interested in the facility's weak points?
162953171.english: Hm... You two are drawn to the singularity's flame?

1059686692.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_2
1059686692.jp_real: 良い流れ、というものではないかえ？
1059686692.en_literal: A good flow, wouldn't you say?

164985120.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_3
164985120.jp_real: フーム、うまく繋げたものよ。
164985120.en_literal: Hmph. I managed to connect it well.

568945023.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
568945023.jp_real: しかし、奇特な星の民もいたものぞよ。
568945023.en_literal: But there were also those who were blessed by the stars.
568945023.english: How very strange you are, Astral.

76724005.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
76724005.jp_real: この後の闇を恐れぬのかえ？
76724005.en_literal: Are you afraid of the darkness beyond?
76724005.english: Do you not fear my darkness?

379094906.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
379094906.jp_real: ところで、そち、つがいはおらぬのかや？
379094906.en_literal: By the way, don't you have a successor?
379094906.english: Tell me, knight, are you part of a dyad?

61283355.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
61283355.jp_real: そちに継ぎはおらぬのかや？
61283355.en_literal: Are you not going to take action?
61283355.english: Have you formed a dyad, helmsman?

463739687.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
463739687.jp_real: さてさて、はよう次に参るぞ！
463739687.en_literal: Well then, let's get this show on the road!
463739687.english: Make haste! We've more battles to win!

798598102.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
798598102.jp_real: コナタにも、そいやー！お見せるぞよ！
798598102.en_literal: I'll show you what I've got, Eugen!
798598102.english: Come! I wish to show them my own! Soiya!

676415264.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
676415264.jp_real: 星の獣と共に戦うというのも面白い！
676415264.en_literal: Fighting alongside a star beast sounds interesting!
676415264.english: It pleases me to fight beside a primal beast.

142475064.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
142475064.jp_real: フフ…人とケモノであっても、絆というものが芽生えると？
142475064.en_literal: Hmph. Even between humans and beasts, bonds can still grow?
142475064.english: Hm... Bonds can form between spirits and beasts?

287462393.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
287462393.jp_real: ほう？これが白龍の名を掲げるこの力か
287462393.en_literal: Oh? So this is the power that earns the name of Hakuryuu?
287462393.english: A mortal who fancies himself a white dragon. How droll.

443445454.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
443445454.jp_real: ヨキハタラキデアッタゾヨ

32527795.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
32527795.jp_real: そち、オオトヤラになりたいのかや？
32527795.en_literal: So you want to be a king, do you?
32527795.english: It is your hope to be king someday.

369708414.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
369708414.jp_real: ところで、そちのつがいはどこかへ？
369708414.en_literal: By the way, where are you taking that thing?
369708414.english: Tell us! Where's the other half of your dyad?

377236195.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
377236195.jp_real: ホホ、よく合わせた。褒めて使わそ。
377236195.en_literal: Ho ho, you've got a good eye. I'll praise you and use you.
377236195.english: Well fought, mortal. You've earned my attention.

471266104.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
471266104.jp_real: ホー？目つきが変わりよった

458318096.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
458318096.jp_real: 面白そうなことを閃いたぞよ。コナタがそちに弟子入りしてみるのはどうかえ？
458318096.en_literal: I've just had a brilliant idea. How about you try joining the others?
458318096.english: Inspiration has struck! Punch Lord, will you take me as your disciple?

472863416.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
472863416.jp_real: なるほど。この権限帯にも慣れてきたか？
472863416.en_literal: I see. You've grown accustomed to this authority as well?
472863416.english: Yes, good. I'm starting to get a feel for this form.

753199520.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
753199520.jp_real: どれ、次も少し遊んでやるかえ？
753199520.en_literal: So, shall I play with you some more?
753199520.english: So, shall we find our next diversion?

706197496.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
706197496.jp_real: その一撃に、美少女かどうかは関係ないであろう。
706197496.en_literal: That blow has nothing to do with being a beautiful girl.
706197496.english: Does a charming exterior really augment your attacks?

818929988.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
818929988.jp_real: そちの尽力に、こなたも応えねばな。
818929988.en_literal: I'll have to match your efforts.

26156825.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
26156825.jp_real: そちは何故、真の力を見せようとせぬのかや？
26156825.en_literal: What makes you think you can show me your true power?
26156825.english: You are a font of power. Why disguise your potential?

64134882.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
64134882.jp_real: ホホー！今の一撃は面白いぞよ！
64134882.en_literal: Ho ho! That one hit was quite the show!

1063453403.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
1063453403.jp_real: 所詮はそよ風に過ぎぬ
1063453403.en_literal: It's nothing more than a gentle breeze.

887126420.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
887126420.jp_real: そちのいかずちで、みなのゆくみちをてらしてみせよ。
887126420.en_literal: Let the lightning of my will illuminate the path for all.
887126420.english: Your thunder protects and destroys in equal measure.

424707723.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
424707723.jp_real: 悪魔を司る星の獣に従えておるのかよ
424707723.en_literal: Do you follow the beast of stars that rules over demons?
424707723.english: Who is the master? You... or that beast?

195892572.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
195892572.jp_real: まだまだここからぞよ！
195892572.english: May they fall into the pitch of night!

28677067.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
28677067.jp_real: この勢いを止めるでないぞ！
28677067.en_literal: I won't let you stop this momentum!

628332297.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
628332297.jp_real: まだ終わりではないぞよ

757996121.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
757996121.jp_real: ホォー？珍妙な技を使う
757996121.en_literal: Oh? Using a rather peculiar technique, are we?
757996121.english: Ooh, your arts are quite unique!

798616864.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
798616864.jp_real: ほれ、赤の孤竜がそちを褒めておるぞよ。
798616864.en_literal: Huh? Your red dragon's praising you?
798616864.english: The red dragon speaks highly of you, knight.

357356398.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
357356398.jp_real: 人の子は翼を持たぬのに、何故空を飛びたがる？
357356398.en_literal: Why do humans yearn to fly when they have no wings?
357356398.english: Mortals are born without wings. Yet some of you wish to fly. Why?

228692242.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
228692242.jp_real: そうだ。恋花をしようぞ。人の子の乙女の鉄板ではないかや？
228692242.en_literal: That's right. Let's go for the love petals. Isn't that the usual thing for a girl like you?
228692242.english: Ah, yes. Shall we speak of love? I've heard girl talk is popular with young mortals.

1072513697.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
1072513697.jp_real: そちのつがいは、しのことはりのあちらがわか。
1072513697.en_literal: So, you're saying that the other side of the curse is the "Sphere of Reversal"?
1072513697.english: I've heard your dyad was split in twain by death.

80090350.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
80090350.jp_real: 人の子はつがいに花を贈ると聞いたが、本当かよ？
80090350.en_literal: I heard humans send flowers to the dead. Is that true?
80090350.english: Tell me, why do mortals exchange flowers?

563212720.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
563212720.jp_real: そち達はにぎやかで見ていて飽きぬ
563212720.en_literal: You all are so lively, it's getting boring just watching.
563212720.english: Ooh, I shall never tire of their lively display!

1025623356.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
1025623356.jp_real: これが騎士道というものかや？
1025623356.en_literal: So this is what you call chivalry?
1025623356.english: So you practice chivalry, is it?

115630589.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
115630589.jp_real: ホオ？今の機を逃さぬとは
115630589.en_literal: Hoh? You're not letting that chance slip by?
115630589.english: Heed me! We will seize this chance!

521530647.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
521530647.jp_real: フム、そちには継嗣はおらぬのかや？
521530647.en_literal: Hmph. Don't you have any shame?
521530647.english: Have you no one to complete your dyad?

63142403.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
63142403.jp_real: まだまだ暴れ足りぬぞよ！
63142403.english: Careful, mortal. I am not yet sated.

306080340.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
306080340.jp_real: そちにもつがいはおるのかえ？

805509950.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
805509950.jp_real: 闇をも切り裂かんとするか
805509950.en_literal: Shall I cut through the darkness?
805509950.english: You stand poised to cut through darkness itself.

202890639.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
202890639.jp_real: おもしろいものを見せてくれたぞよ！

1060904928.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
1060904928.jp_real: それで、そちのつがいはあのドラフ？
1060904928.en_literal: So, your successor is that dwarf?
1060904928.english: So you're in a dyad with that large drake?

252550691.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
252550691.jp_real: ところで、そちが相棒と呼ぶ相手、つがいとは違うのかよ？
252550691.en_literal: By the way, is the one you call an ally different from your rival?

697964399.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
697964399.jp_real: フム、そのアリオ、興味深いな。
697964399.english: Hmm. What an intriguing little being you are.

382729094.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
382729094.jp_real: 道に迷わば、我ら六龍が支援しよう。
382729094.en_literal: If you're lost, we Six Dragons will support you.
382729094.english: Should you falter, we six dragons will guide you.

112711261.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
112711261.jp_real: 天使長たるその力、さすがぞよ！
112711261.en_literal: The power of the Archangel... You're quite something!
112711261.english: The Supreme Primark lives up to his title!

906238079.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
906238079.jp_real: ホー？こなたの動きに完璧に合わせるとは。
906238079.en_literal: Hooh... To move in perfect sync with you...
906238079.english: Few can match so well my movements.

197340136.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
197340136.jp_real: さあ、コナタにダジャレとやらを見せよ！
197340136.en_literal: Alright, let's show you what we're made of!
197340136.english: I've heard tell of your puns. So go on, spout one!

422161786.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
422161786.jp_real: この後の黒に染めぬこうぞ
422161786.english: I'll paint them with my deepest black.

168628410.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
168628410.jp_real: ところで、そちのつがいはどこかえ？
168628410.en_literal: By the way, where's your other half?
168628410.english: Tell me, who completes your dyad?

448007720.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
448007720.jp_real: フム、ソチのツガイはその剣かや？なんとも奥が深いぞよ。
448007720.en_literal: Hmph. So that's what your twin is like? That sword... it's got a lot of depth to it.
448007720.english: Huh. I've never met a mortal who formed a dyad with their blade. How curious.

614877748.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
614877748.jp_real: そちは複雑な因果に囚われているようだな
614877748.en_literal: You seem to be trapped in a complex cause and effect.
614877748.english: I sense a wicked fate that binds you.

169513361.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
169513361.jp_real: 褒められれば悪い気はせぬ
169513361.en_literal: I won't let myself be corrupted by praise.

335283478.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
335283478.jp_real: この程度、さじに過ぎぬがな。
335283478.en_literal: This is just a drop in the bucket.

69674594.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
69674594.jp_real: 何も見えぬ場所へ誘ってやろう
69674594.en_literal: I'll take you to a place where nothing can be seen.
69674594.english: That was trivial. Let me show you real darkness.

340466968.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
340466968.jp_real: イヨイヨイ！そう、かしこまるの！
340466968.en_literal: Hmph, I'm flattered you'd say so.
340466968.english: Worry not, it was a trifle.

105699679.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
105699679.jp_real: イヨイヨイ！励めよ人の子！

152593251.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
152593251.jp_real: その強制に乗らせてもらうぞよ
152593251.en_literal: I'll ride that tide of yours!

489901294.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
489901294.jp_real: これもまた、宿命というやつかや。
489901294.en_literal: So this is another one of those "fate" things, huh?
489901294.english: I believe the mortals call that fate.

986324760.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
986324760.jp_real: 死の断りを超えるか。危うくはあるが、今は見守るとするかえ。
986324760.en_literal: Can you transcend the will of death? Though it may be perilous, shall we watch over it now?
986324760.english: You've escaped the binds of death. That bodes ill. But we'll let it rest for now.

1049845910.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
1049845910.jp_real: 銀世界をも闇に染めてみせようぞ
1049845910.en_literal: Let's dye this silver world black too.
1049845910.english: Even the pure white of winter cannot escape my darkness.

444790307.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
444790307.jp_real: これこそが得意天の引力であろうな
444790307.en_literal: This is the power of my specialty, aren't you impressed?

475346398.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
475346398.jp_real: これが六竜の極の力だよ
475346398.en_literal: This is the dark power of the Six Dragons.

82984567.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
82984567.jp_real: おっと、刺激が強いと毒となるか？
82984567.en_literal: Huh? Could it be that too much stimulation becomes poison?
82984567.english: Huh. Stimulation is bad for you.

83193115.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
83193115.jp_real: ううん？人の子は、体育の大将にこだわりがあるのかよ？
83193115.en_literal: Huh? Are you two obsessed with the balance of yin and yang?
83193115.english: Ah, I take it mortals are obsessed with the size of their physique?

290820836.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
290820836.jp_real: 百年前っぽっちも生きておらぬのに、長生きとな。
290820836.en_literal: Even after a hundred years, you're still alive. You've got a long life ahead of you.
290820836.english: Live long enough, but you've yet to reach your one hundredth year.

982932654.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
982932654.jp_real: この方の真なる闇、そちは見極められるかや？
982932654.en_literal: Your true darkness... can you fathom it?
982932654.english: Oh, perhaps you could comprehend my truest darkness.

9980714.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
9980714.jp_real: ハハハハハ、豪気なことを言う人の子ぞよ！
9980714.en_literal: Heh heh heh... You're quite the talker, aren't you?
9980714.english: How bold the words of this mortal!

252590949.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
252590949.jp_real: おお？張り合うかえ？やってみせるがよいぞよ
252590949.en_literal: Oh? You wanna go at it? I'll show you what I'm made of!
252590949.english: Oh, a challenger. Go on then. Show us your mettle.

168356843.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
168356843.jp_real: 恐怖を引き比べるか。それもまた人の子の生き方よな。
168356843.en_literal: To compare fears...? That's just another way of living, isn't it?
168356843.english: Mortals rank fear? I suppose emotions do rule your lives.

110804386.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
110804386.jp_real: ハハハハハ、ういやつよ。
110804386.en_literal: Hehehe... You're quite something, aren't you?

840711729.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
840711729.jp_real: サボるでないぞよ。こなたのみで、どうこうなるものでもないのだからな。
840711729.en_literal: I'm not here to play around. I'm just here to see what happens.
840711729.english: This is not a one-dragon show. You must bear your burden in equal measure.

142102777.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
142102777.jp_real: こうやって、なぶるのが好きなのかよ？
142102777.en_literal: So you like beating people up like this?
142102777.english: Do you always play with your prey?

208725853.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
208725853.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!

649448617.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
649448617.jp_real: フフフ、スイーツとやらでお礼をしてくれてもよいぞよ。
649448617.en_literal: Hehe, you can thank me with sweets anytime.
649448617.english: Hmhm, you may offer candy as oblation.

972239684.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
972239684.jp_real: 面白い技よ！もっと見せるぞよ！
972239684.en_literal: That's an interesting technique. I'll show you more!
972239684.english: You entertain me. Show me more of your techniques.

691870258.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
691870258.jp_real: そちはどうもいきいそいでおるように見えるが、なにゆえかよ？
691870258.en_literal: You seem in a hurry, Eustace. What's the matter?
691870258.english: You seem to bolt through life. Tell me why.

190895614.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
190895614.jp_real: まだまだ、こんなものではないぞよ。
190895614.en_literal: Not bad, but this is nothing compared to what I can do!
190895614.english: And yet I'm capable of so much more!

765691071.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
765691071.jp_real: フフ、騒ぐほどではない
765691071.en_literal: Hehe, not quite worth the fuss.
765691071.english: So much fuss over so little effort.

321389203.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
321389203.jp_real: この後の手にかかれば当然ぞよ
321389203.en_literal:
Of course, I'll translate the Japanese line into natural English. The speaker is Fediel, and the context is a skill or co-op link. The move names are already in English.

The Japanese line is:
「このあたの手にかかれば当然ぞよ」

This translates to:
"Of course, it's in my hands now."
321389203.english: As expected from Fediel of the Black.

834711080.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
834711080.jp_real: イヨイヨイ！空が民に尽くすとあらば、星の民とて受け入れようぞ！
834711080.en_literal: Alright, alright. If the sky is to be filled with darkness, then I shall accept it as the sky's will.
834711080.english: I shall accept this gratitude, if only because you wield your powers for the skies.

931859476.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
931859476.jp_real: トクイテンとの旅は実に刺激的ぞよ
931859476.en_literal: Traveling with a specialist is truly exhilarating.
931859476.english: Singularity, your journey is so stimulating.

544186048.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
544186048.jp_real: おや？この程度で構わんのかや？
544186048.en_literal: Huh? You think that's enough to stop me?
544186048.english: You stand awed by such a simple showing!

80193377.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
80193377.jp_real: 我が力、うまく使うがよいぞよ。
80193377.english: Use my power well, mortal... or else.

811627640.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
811627640.jp_real: もっと敬ってもいいぞよ
811627640.en_literal: You can show me more respect.

916950211.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
916950211.jp_real: ん？何言うえぞよ。隠す必要もあるまい。
916950211.en_literal: Huh? What are you talking about? There's no need to hide it.
916950211.english: What's this? Do these mortals have something to hide?

687070282.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
687070282.jp_real: 星の獣に助力するとはなあ、縁は不思議なものよ。
687070282.en_literal: To ally with a star-beast... that's quite the bond.
687070282.english: To fight alongside a primal beast... Fate plays interesting tricks.

791889337.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
791889337.jp_real: 資源の闇の深さ、そこ知れぬであろう？
791889337.en_literal: The abyss of origins... you know nothing of its depths.
791889337.english: Deeper indeed! The primordial abyss holds no bottom!

536642813.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
536642813.jp_real: そう、堅苦しくなるでない？
536642813.en_literal: You're getting all stiff and formal, aren't you?

994406252.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
994406252.jp_real: ははははは、リュウ使いがアラアイゾヨ！
994406252.en_literal: Hehehe... Looks like the sky's favor is on our side!

471495022.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
471495022.jp_real: コナタの闇を照らせぬとしても、恥じることは無いぞよ。
471495022.en_literal: Even if you can't shine light into that darkness, there's no shame in it.
471495022.english: Then you have yet to test it against my abyss!

617438376.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
617438376.jp_real: しっかり！我が闇の前では万物が無力ぞよ！
617438376.en_literal: Indeed, before my darkness, all things are powerless.
617438376.english: Yes. What is creation before the void?

151895455.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
151895455.jp_real: そちもハービンの子の中では規格外のように思えるぞよ
151895455.en_literal: Even you seem like an oddity among the Harbinger's children.
151895455.english: Likewise, you seem to stand a league above your Harvin brethren.

291543639.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
291543639.jp_real: ふふふん。苦しゅうないぞよ。
291543639.en_literal: Hehe, you're not suffering at all, are you?
291543639.english: Fear not, I won't turn them on you.

332295667.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
332295667.en_literal: Hehe, don't you worry about it.

878557009.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
878557009.jp_real: ホオ？面白そうではないか。体現してみせよ。
878557009.en_literal: Oh? Sounds interesting. Show me what you've got.
878557009.english: Ooh, yes! Do so immediately! I wish to see your strength!

971663211.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
971663211.jp_real: おそれることをおそれずともよいそよ。武をわきまえることは身を守ることにつながるゆえな。
971663211.en_literal: There's no need to fear what you should fear. Avoiding evil is the way to protect yourself.
971663211.english: Embrace your fear. Terror begets safety. For mortals prize life above all else.

854719935.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
854719935.jp_real: バザラガ、空気を読むとやらを試してみたのだが
854719935.en_literal: I tried testing that fellow who says he can read the air.
854719935.english: I thought to test the mortal concept of restraint.

744179511.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
744179511.jp_real: ホム、何を一人で遊んでおるのかや？
744179511.en_literal: Hmph. What are you playing with all by yourself?
744179511.english: Hmm. Do you pose for recreation or...

927728509.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
927728509.jp_real: そちの中に眠る竜の力、決して支配を許すでないぞ。
927728509.en_literal: The dragon's power slumbering within you... I will never allow it to be controlled!
927728509.english: Yet the dragon that sleeps within you must never take control. Am I clear?

152663815.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
152663815.jp_real: ヨイヨイ、これも成り行き。しばしつきあうとしよう。
152663815.en_literal: Alright, alright. This is how it goes. Let's have a little chat.
152663815.english: I merely followed my whims. And they've led me to your side. For now.

399098532.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
399098532.jp_real: そうせいのミザとつながる措置こそ、興味が尽きぬがね。
399098532.en_literal: I'm intrigued by the device that connects to the Source's fountain.
399098532.english: No, it is you, with your connection to the Holy Seed of Genesis, who is cool.

965698464.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
965698464.jp_real: フフフ、たやすくことぞよ

4834138.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
4834138.jp_real: フーム。そちは働き者であるのだな？
4834138.en_literal: Hmph. So you're a worker bee, then?
4834138.english: Hah! So you are what the mortals call a workhorse?

175388193.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
175388193.jp_real: この後の嫌味で塗りつぶしてくれよぞ
175388193.en_literal: Let's cover you in my darkness.
175388193.english: I merely drown the world in darkness!

708069153.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
708069153.jp_real: この程度ならばいつでも手を貸そうぞ
708069153.english: A trifle like that? Think nothing of it!

590380643.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
590380643.jp_real: くっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっ
590380643.en_literal: Heh heh heh... You're quite the worker, aren't you?
590380643.english: And you are a horse that burns!

79229458.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_2
79229458.jp_real: もう少々、深みに至っても良いのかや。
79229458.en_literal: Shall we go a little deeper?

456554899.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
456554899.jp_real: イオカロ！闇に染めようぞ！
456554899.en_literal: I'll take you to the abyss. Let's dye you in darkness.
456554899.english: They shall all fade to black.

249945985.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
249945985.jp_real: 断章に花を咲かすのは、目の前の歪な闇を払ってからぞよ。
249945985.en_literal: Blooming a flower in the wasteland... is about clearing the crooked darkness right before our eyes.
249945985.english: Dispatch these fiends first. Then we may talk at leisure.

339636214.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
339636214.jp_real: グラン、黒に染め果てようぞ

725818663.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
725818663.jp_real: この程度ならば自業であろう
725818663.en_literal: If it's just this, it's child's play.
725818663.english: Hmph. Does such child's play require teamwork?

95225040.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
95225040.jp_real: 苦境を乗り越え成長していく。人の子の営みは実に面白い。
95225040.en_literal: Overcoming adversity and growing stronger... Human emotions are truly fascinating.
95225040.english: To err is to be mortal, and to be mortal is to grow. Your lives are indeed fascinating.

20203761.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
20203761.jp_real: ふふふ、闇は安息を内包するゆえな。
20203761.en_literal: Darkness is the source of the curse.
20203761.english: When falls the night, so falls serenity.

481040887.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
481040887.jp_real: お仕置きとは何ぞ？楽しそうじゃん！
481040887.english: What is this obedience lesson? I too wish to participate!

1068447303.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
1068447303.jp_real: フム、意を決し計らうがよい
1068447303.en_literal: Hmph. You'd do better to be careful.
1068447303.english: Very well. Do not disappoint me.

10301059.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
10301059.jp_real: 六竜たる小凜の盾になる必要はないぞよ
10301059.en_literal: I don't need to be the shield for your little brat anymore.
10301059.english: I'm not worried. A dragon needs no shield.

685707748.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
685707748.jp_real: 人の子の示す熱意に、ひととき甘えるとしようかや。
685707748.en_literal: I'll indulge in the warmth of this child's passion for just a moment.
685707748.english: I'll indulge your request. Carry on, mortal.

588769898.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
588769898.jp_real: ううん？加減が必要かよ？
588769898.english: What's this? Should I lessen my approach?

888190191.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
888190191.jp_real: フーム。では、少々遊んでみるとしよう。
888190191.en_literal: Hmph. Then I'll have a little fun with you.
888190191.english: Alright then, let us have a little fun!

187109162.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
187109162.jp_real: うんふふ。いいおもや。これが、うまいことを言ってやったという状況かや？
187109162.en_literal: Hmph. So this is what you call "saying something clever"?
187109162.english: Huh? Does that mean I bored them? Or that I fought well?

171243412.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
171243412.jp_real: ふむ。そちの心を蝕む闇があるのかや？難儀なことずよ。
171243412.en_literal: Hmph. Is there some darkness that's devouring your heart? How pitiful.
171243412.english: Hmm. Darkness seems to gnaw at your heart. How vexing.

949138344.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
949138344.jp_real: 選択から雰囲気を学ぶことも重要よの？
949138344.en_literal: Learning the atmosphere from the chaos is also important.
949138344.english: Mortals emulate their elders, do they not? The darkness... it flows within me!

452241986.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
452241986.jp_real: フフム、面白い考えぞよ。どうやって至ったのか後で教えよ。
452241986.en_literal: Hmph. That's an interesting idea. Tell me how you came up with it later.
452241986.english: Ah, brilliance in sight! Tell me how you arrived at this thought after we've won!

779705229.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
779705229.jp_real: 構わぬ。好きにするがよい。
779705229.en_literal: I don't care. Do as you please.
779705229.english: Very well. Do as you prefer.

1012235989.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
1012235989.jp_real: 一瞬で黒に染めたとて、つまらぬである？
1012235989.en_literal: To dye it black in an instant? How dull.
1012235989.english: And spoil all the fun? You wish me to die of boredom.

657046318.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
657046318.jp_real: 焦るな。心を、意思を取り落としかねんぞよ。
657046318.en_literal: Don't rush it. You'll lose your heart, your will.
657046318.english: Good. You must hold fast, lest your mind and will be lost.

842004813.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
842004813.jp_real: おっと？これでも加減していたつもりぞよ？
842004813.en_literal: Huh? You were still holding back, weren't you?
842004813.english: More restraint? But I was already holding back.

777646972.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
777646972.jp_real: ふふふ、なかなか良い塩梅であろう？
777646972.en_literal: Heh heh. Not a bad arrangement, now, are we?

233646728.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
233646728.jp_real: ん？それを言うなら、すっごくではないかよ？
233646728.en_literal: Huh? If you're gonna say that, isn't it kinda... too much?
233646728.english: No. Threaded the needle is the mortal phrase.

259545717.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
259545717.jp_real: 今はその時ではない。とだけ答えておこうかや。
259545717.en_literal: Now's not the time for that. I'll just give you that much in reply.
259545717.english: Such things are reserved as necessity demands.

94357331.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
94357331.jp_real: ホホホ。ならば手早く片付けるとしようぞ。
94357331.en_literal: Ho ho! Then let's quickly wrap this up!
94357331.english: Well then, let us finish here quickly.

407997441.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
407997441.jp_real:
それはマコトか？  
俄然楽しみになってきたぞよ！
407997441.en_literal: Is that so? I'm suddenly looking forward to this.

491916973.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
491916973.jp_real: 空の世界を守る。それはコナタたち共通の願いではないかえ？
491916973.en_literal: Protecting the world of sky... isn't that the shared wish of all of us?
491916973.english: We protect the Sky Realm. Surely our goals are aligned.

121550900.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
121550900.jp_real: 思い詰めれば視野が狭まる。気をつけるぞよ。
121550900.en_literal: If you think too hard, your vision gets narrow. Watch out.
121550900.english: No. Do not agonize over such things, lest you forfeit perspective.
